headline: Optically catastrophic EPS miss (6.6x worse than Street), but ~70% is non-cash BTC mark-to-market. Real story: AI/HPC pivot still has no tenant.
realStoryHeadlines: Normalized EBITDA (ex-BTC MTM): operational ~$22M positive vs $70M YoY (−69%) — ugly but not catastrophic
Long-term debt nearly tripled: $645M → $1.79B in 6 months. ~$1.15B is 0% convertible.
$463M in buybacks while bleeding — treasury stock $145M → $608M. Capital allocation flag.
94% of stockholders' equity is BTC ($925M / $986M) — leveraged BTC fund with mining + AI option
NO hyperscaler tenant announced. Only 'leasing progress in Georgia' — power-supply secured, demand-side empty
Catalyst calendar: B. Riley 5/21, Macquarie AI Infra 6/10, Northland 6/23 — mgmt teeing up the announcement

frameworkOverride.rationale: Mining business in isolation = Maturity→Decline (post-halving). AI/HPC pivot in isolation = Young Growth (pre-revenue). Consolidated reality doesn't map cleanly. EV/Rev 4.8x already prices significant pivot success.
frameworkOverride.valuationTool: EV/Sales for AI option, oscillators/range for mining

tradingRead.earningsRule: Triggered today — structures across print correctly capped LOW conf. Q3 print is next binary.
tradingRead.postPrintIV: IV crush coming. Hyperscaler tease without delivery for 2nd consecutive print → IV stays bid into June conf cycle.
tradingRead.longThesisGate: Requires (a) BTC holds ~$80K+, (b) at least one hyperscaler MOU by Q3 FY26 call, (c) no equity raise on top of $1.79B debt.
tradingRead.bottomLine: BTC-beta vehicle with embedded AI option. If no deal by 6/23 Northland conf, mentally rebase as pure BTC miner with debt — not transformation play. Co-trigger w/ BMNR ladder freeze rule.
